phrases.intent_en: Ask where the almadraba tuna stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca de atum de almadraba?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dee FEE-kah ah BAN-kah jee ah-TOONG jee al-mah-DRAH-bah (liaison: link "banca de" → BAN-kah-jee, "atum de" → ah-TOONG-jee)
phrases.cultural_note: Specialty catches like almadraba tuna are grouped with the main seafood section for freshness management.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao pavilhão central de peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the central fish pavilion.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the central fish pavilion.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL DIH PAY-shih.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao pavilhão central de peixe.

phrases.text_local: Pode sugerir um restaurante típico perto do mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: PAW-dih soo-zhih-REER OONNG rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih TEE-pee-koo PEHR-too DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tuna stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca do atum?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee FEE-kah ah BAN-kah doo ah-TOONG
phrases.cultural_note: Market staff typically use permanent structural landmarks for navigation rather than stall numbers.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto ao pavilhão central de peixe.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL DIH PAY-shih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the central fish pavilion.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the central fish pavilion.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN sayngt-RAHL DIH PAY-shih.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto ao pavilhão central de peixe.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the weighing scale is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a balança de pesar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH buh-LAHNNG-suh DIH pih-ZAHR?
phrases.cultural_note: Public scales are placed in high-traffic zones to serve multiple stalls and verify weights fairly.

likely_response.local: Junto ao pavilhão do peixe, à direita.
likely_response.pronunciation: ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN DOO PAY-shih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
likely_response.translation_en: The central scale is near the central fish pavilion.

responses.english: The central scale is near the central fish pavilion.
responses.phonetic: ZHOONNG-too OW puh-vee-LYOWN DOO PAY-shih, AH dee-RAY-tuh.
responses.french: Junto ao pavilhão do peixe, à direita.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the almadraba tuna stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde está a banca do atum almadraba?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH BAHNNG-kuh DOO uh-TOONNG ahl-muhd-RAH-buh?
phrases.cultural_note: Almadraba refers to traditional tuna trap fishing; this stall is a market staple.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the restaurant till is
phrases.text_local: Onde é a caixa do restaurante?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AH KEYE-shuh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Market restaurants usually position payment points away from food preparation areas for hygiene compliance.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao gerente no Restaurante do Mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zheh-RAYNG-tih NOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the manager at Restaurante do Mercado.

responses.english: Ask the manager at Restaurante do Mercado.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW zheh-RAYNG-tih NOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao gerente no Restaurante do Mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cheese counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde está o balcão de queijos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Local dairy counters are situated near the central walkways to maintain consistent temperature control.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o balcão de queijos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cheese counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cheese counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoosh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o balcão de queijos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish pavilion is
phrases.cultural_note: Fresh seafood sections are centrally located to ensure efficient drainage and supply access.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo, à direita da frutaria.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo, AH dee-RAY-tuh DUH froo-tuh-REEUH.

responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo, AH dee-RAY-tuh DUH froo-tuh-REEUH.
responses.french: Ao fundo, à direita da frutaria.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Restaurante do Mercado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Restaurante do Mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Restaurante do Mercado.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Restaurante do Mercado.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Restaurante do Mercado.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o melhor restaurante de frutos do mar por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mih-LYAWR rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DIH FROO-toosh DOO MAHR POOR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Restaurante do Mercado.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih DOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Restaurante do Mercado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cheese counter is
phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde fica o balcão de queijos?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH KAY-zhoosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The cheese counter is a stable feature at Tavira Municipal Market, typically located along the perimeter near the hortifrúti (fruit and vegetable) area. Vendors expect a 'Bom dia' greeting before asking.

likely_response.translation_en: On the perimeter, near the fruit and vegetable section.

responses.english: On the perimeter, near the fruit and vegetable section.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tuna stall is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a banca do atum?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BAHNNG-kuh DOO uh-TOONNG?
phrases.cultural_note: Atum de Almadraba is a prized local delicacy; the stall is a highlight of the market.
